title: eulophia arenicola
intro: Eulophia arenicola, also known as the Sand Orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa, characterized by its unique, yellowish-green flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eulophia arenicola are said to include the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as skin and wound infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or extracts, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
